items.title: Chris Cenac Jr. and Jordan Walsh are both alums of Link Academy (MO).
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Chris Cenac Jr. and Jordan Walsh are both alums of Link Academy (MO).

I asked Cenac if he knew Walsh before joining the Celtics.

“I didn't, but I'm looking forward to talking to him about his experience there for sure.”

items.title: Celtics officially announce they have exercised the team options in the contracts of Neemias Queta, Jordan Walsh, and Dalano Banton
items.author: John Karalis
items.body_excerpt: Celtics officially announce they have exercised the team options in the contracts of Neemias Queta, Jordan Walsh, and Dalano Banton

items.title: Boston picking up their team options for Neemias Queta and Jordan Walsh makes sense from managing the team salary under the tax and first apron for 2026-27.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Boston picking up their team options for Neemias Queta and Jordan Walsh makes sense from managing the team salary under the tax and first apron for 2026-27.

Both Queta and Walsh stay on a lower salary for this season and can be extended in-season to start new contracts in 2027-28.
